notes: Multi-seed quorum bundle. Each record carries the seed's public key fingerprint + region. The auto_mesh client tries seeds in declared order; first reachable wins. A record is trusted only when at least min_signatures cross-validator signatures sign its (host, port, pubkey_pem) tuple. The operator publishes this file via a signed GitHub release and a pluginfer-update CLI verifies signatures on each pull.

operator_overrides.comment: Env vars override the records[] list — used for local dev (127.0.0.1:9000) and for closed mesh deployments where the operator runs their own seed cluster. Operator publishes their seed_registry.json over signed HTTPS; pluginfer-update verifies quorum signatures before adopting it. Until min_signatures records carry valid quorum_signatures, the auto_mesh client falls back to env-override OR --gossip-bootstrap injection — never to an unsigned record.
